summary: Founder OS has reviewed the approved Natural Nation architecture, product decisions, Duey specifications, onboarding flow, design system, and MVP governance records.

known.label: Business
known.evidence: Founder vision, approved product strategy, and project state

known.label: Audience
known.value: Adults seeking practical holistic wellness support
known.evidence: Approved product positioning and age-floor decision

known.label: Core Experience
known.value: Personalized blueprint, daily protocol, progress, and Duey guidance
known.evidence: Approved onboarding flow and dashboard architecture

uncertainties.question: Should paid subscription billing be included in the first Natural Nation MVP release?
uncertainties.reason: Monetization has been discussed, but billing is not locked as an MVP requirement.

recommendation.title: Complete the MVP billing decision
recommendation.impact: Resolving this decision allows Founder OS to classify Billing as Required, Recommended, or Later and complete the first draft Workspace Blueprint.
recommendation.reasoning: The product, audience, AI mentor, and core experience are already supported by approved records. Revenue remains the lowest-confidence blueprint category because subscription billing has been discussed but has not been approved for the first MVP release.

sources.title: Workspace Discovery and Blueprint Engine
sources.usedFor: Defines the discovery process, recommendation classes, and the requirement to resolve material uncertainty before application installation.

sources.title: Natural Nation Project State
sources.usedFor: Confirms the current discovery result and records MVP billing as unresolved.

sources.title: Founder OS Decision Ledger
sources.usedFor: Confirms approved platform, workspace, and blueprint decisions while showing no approved MVP billing decision.

sources.title: Phase 4 Roadmap
sources.usedFor: Identifies the Natural Nation blueprint as the active vertical-slice objective.

history.detail: Founder OS Gateway deployed and public health routes validated.
Workspace Registry and Command Center UX v1.1 Founder validated PASS.
Natural Nation intelligence loaded with 87% overall confidence.
Resolve MVP billing so the draft Workspace Blueprint can be generated.
